title: Syrian Gyro-Style Ramen
description: A fusion of Japanese ramen and Syrian gyros, this dish combines the rich flavors of the Middle East with the comforting warmth of a bowl of noodles.
instructions: Cook the ramen noodles according to package instructions. Typically 3-5 minutes.
Preheat a pan or grill to medium-high heat.
Season the Syrian kofta with salt and pepper. Cook for 5-7 minutes per side, or until the internal temperature reaches 63°C (145°F) for medium-rare.
Slice the cooked kofta into thin strips.
In a separate pan, heat some oil over medium heat. Add the sliced green onions and cook for 1-2 minutes.
To assemble the dish, place a portion of cooked noodles in a bowl, followed by a few slices of the cooked kofta. Drizzle with soy sauce and garnish with additional green onions.
Serve the mayonnaise on the side for those who prefer.
Warm the flatbread in a toaster or oven for a few minutes. Slice into thin strips and serve alongside.
Garnish with additional green onions and a sprinkle of toasted sesame seeds, if desired.
